getting-started/requirements.title: Requirements
getting-started/requirements.description: Ensure you have the following installed:

getting-started/setup.title: Setup
getting-started/setup.description: pnpm dev starts the library (build watch), server, webapp, and a local Redis container (requires Docker). If the default ports are taken, it picks free ports and prints the URLs.

mobile/ios-android-setup.title: iOS and Android Setup
mobile/ios-android-setup.description: This guide covers setting up the mobile applications for iOS and Android using Capacitor.
